ab: kemuda u mukuwa i talraviyaw?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: mipalizing ku mukuwa i talraviyaw.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: kemuda mukuwa i biyoing intaw?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: kemakawang intaw mukuwa i biyoing.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i Bokoto?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muitras ku za hikuki mukuwa i Bokoto.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i Bokoto?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muitras ku za sudang mukuwa i Bokoto.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: muitras u za eman muruma’?
en: How do you go home?

ab: muitras ku za ciyēyun muruma’.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: muitras za eman i Varikay mukuwa i kungkuwan?
en: How does Varikay go to school?

ab: muitras za kissiya i Varikay mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: Varikay goes to school by train.

ab: muitras za eman i Varikay mukuwa i kiyokay?
en: How does Varikay go to church?

ab: midinsiya i Varikay mukuwa i kiyokay.
en: Varikay goes to church by bicycle.

ab: muitras u za ciyēyun mukuwa i kungkuwan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: melri, muitras ku za bas mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: midinsiya u mukuwa i kungkuwan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ai, midinsiya ku mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: muitras u kana pa’evut na kissiya mukuwa i Takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ai, muitras ku kana pa’evut na kissiya mukuwa i Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: nu mukuwa u i Valangaw muitras u za kissiya za muitras u za hikuki?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: muitras ku za hikuki, muitras ta kana hikuki mu maradika kana kissiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: nu mukuwa u i kiyokay mu, muitras u za bas alra mu midusiya u?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: midusiya ku mukuwa i kiyokay, nu midusiya ta mu marakalra’ayan ta kana bas.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: adalrep mu ruma’ i cawse?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ’azi adalrep, miotobay ku mukuwa i cawse.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: na yubingkiyok adalrep i kungkuwan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: adalrep, nu kemakawang ta mu medek ta.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: na aekanan mu adalrep i siyataw?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: mupatraran ta kemay i siyataw kemakawang ta mu lruwatra pungkang medek ta.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
